export_error_hint: Please reload the page and try again.
error_overpass_fallback: The primary Overpass API is not available. Switching to fallback API (overpass-api.de). Please note that you may experience slower downloads and may be subject to additional usage restrictions. More information at overpass-api.de
progress_elevation_failed: Could not retrieve elevation data. Contours will be disabled.
progress_waiting: Please wait while the site plan is being generated...
error_scale_required_svg: Scale is required for SVG export
error_scale_required_pdf: Scale is required for PDF export
help_step_1_description: Navigate to the desired map position and adjust the area.
help_step_2_description: Select the layers you want to include in the export.
help_step_3_title: Select file format and start download!
help_step_3_description: Click the download button at the bottom right of the map and select your desired format.
privacy_intro: To use SWZPLN, you must accept our privacy policy. We do not collect personal data and only use essential cookies.
privacy_external_data_title: When using SWZPLN, data is transferred from external servers:
privacy_external_data_description_1: The preview map is provided by CARTO. Map data comes from OpenStreetMap contributors. Search uses the Photon API by Komoot.
privacy_external_data_description_2: Processed map data is primarily loaded from our own Overpass API instance. As a fallback, the Overpass API from Private.coffee or overpass-api.de is used.
privacy_external_data_description_3: Elevation data is loaded from the Open Topo Data API with Mapzen data.
search_min_chars: Enter at least 2 characters to search.
seo_default_title: OPENCITYPLANS - Free Site Plan Generator for Architecture, Urban Planning and Design
seo_default_description: Generate professional site plans (schwarzplan) and 3D city models for free. Export as DXF, SVG, PDF, IFC (BIM), or 3D DXF. Perfect for architecture, urban planning, and design. Based on OpenStreetMap data with 3D buildings and terrain.
seo_keywords: site plan, schwarzplan, architecture, urban planning, DXF export, CAD, OpenStreetMap, free tools, architecture, urban planning, 3D terrain, contour lines, building footprints, IFC, BIM, 3D city model, 3D building model, IFC export, BIM model, open BIM, 3D DXF
seo_ai_declaration: This website uses AI for optimization but all core content is human-created
shop_promo_1: Your purchase directly supports SWZPLN development – Browse now!
shop_promo_2: Schwarzplan on a T-Shirt? Support development in the shop
shop_promo_3: Your Schwarzplan on canvas – Support SWZPLN directly
